items.title: Papers: Man Utd concede defeat to Man City in race for Anderson
items.summary: The top stories and transfer rumours from Thursday's newspapers...

items.title: Robertson close to Spurs move after Liverpool exit
items.summary: Tottenham are close to agreeing a deal for Scotland full-back Andy Robertson following his departure from Liverpool.

items.title: Arsenal demand £20m for Jesus - Thursday's gossip
items.summary: Arsenal demand £20m for Gabriel Jesus, Man City prioritise move for Elliot Anderson, RB Leipzig adamant Liverpool target Yan Diomande is going nowhere, plus more.

items.title: Palace beat Rayo to win Conference League and give Glasner perfect farewell
items.summary: Crystal Palace defeated Rayo Vallecano 1-0 in the UEFA Conference League final in Leipzig with Jean-Philippe Mateta scoring the winner to give Oliver Glasner the perfect farewell.

items.title: Bristol City move to appoint Bournemouth's Elphick is off
items.summary: Bristol City had made former Bournemouth defender Tommy Elphick their top choice.

items.title: Crystal Palace win Conference League after Mateta strike sinks Rayo Vallecano
items.summary: After being denied their rightful place in this season’s Europa League, Crystal Palace finally have their revenge. In Oliver Glasner’s final match in charge, it was fitting that Jean-Philippe Mateta should score what turned out to be the winning goal after his January move to Milan was scuppered by

items.title: Anthony Gordon to undergo medical at Barça before £69.3m move from Newcastle
items.summary: England winger flying out for medical on Thursday Gordon could double wages to around £300,000 a week Anthony Gordon is due to undergo a medical in Barcelona on Thursday after the La Liga winners agreed a £69.3m transfer with Newcastle on Wednesday night.
